data.name: Sandbox.Text.0002
data.value: Transparent surface with backdrop blur and readable tint.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0004
data.value: Glass cards use LuminaBackdropBlur with a light readable tint.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0006
data.value: Backdrop blur with a stable edge treatment.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0008
data.value: The tint stays light so the blurred background remains visible.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0010
data.value: Stable tint and edge treatment. No backdrop capture.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0012
data.value: Uses native acrylic material with a lighter tint.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0014
data.value: The same glass family with stronger separation for floating content.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0022
data.value: Transparent surface with a readable tint and a stable edge.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0023
data.value: Card glass: tint-only fallback. No local backdrop capture.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0025
data.value: Glass cards avoid local backdrop capture by default. Use tint for stable surfaces, or Acrylic when the platform supports it.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0027
data.value: The default fallback. It has no backdrop capture and stays stable in lists and scroll views.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0029
data.value: Uses Avalonia's acrylic material where available, with the same tint and edge treatment.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0031
data.value: The same material family with stronger separation for overlays and floating content.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0033
data.value: Identity visuals, counters, dots, and status badges.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0034
data.value: Avatar supports initials, custom content, status badge, and size classes.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0042
data.value: Buttons with leading, trailing, top, bottom, or icon-only content.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0056
data.value: Grouped content with a header, description, and optional trailing actions.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0057
data.value: WinForms-style group boxes with the title sitting on the border and content held by the frame.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0059
data.value: Async image loading with base64 data, web URLs, and memory or disk cache.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0063
data.value: The Source property accepts data:image/*;base64 strings and plain base64 payloads.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0067
data.value: Only HttpClient is replaced; the default Lumina cache is still used.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0070
data.value: Only ILuminaImageCache is replaced; the default shared HttpClient is still used.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0072
data.value: Use the same component for avatar-like images when URL loading and cache are needed.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0075
data.value: ErrorText, ErrorBackground, and ErrorForeground customize the default failed-load surface.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0077
data.value: ErrorContent replaces the whole default error template.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0079
data.value: Use it when several controls belong to the same setting area.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0080
data.value: The title cuts into the top border while helper copy stays inside the frame.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0085
data.value: Actions stay in the group header and do not disturb the content layout.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0086
data.value: Actions can sit on the upper-right border when the group needs compact commands.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0090
data.value: A quiet boundary for dense forms or pages that already have a strong surface.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0091
data.value: A quiet border for dense forms or pages that already have a clear surface.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0094
data.value: A stronger surface for dashboards, sheets, and floating panels.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0095
data.value: The filled state only strengthens the frame interior without changing the group-box structure.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0099
data.value: Glow is useful for focused regions or configuration areas that need emphasis.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0100
data.value: Use compact density inside tool panes and narrow side panels.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0103
data.value: Header can be any content, not just plain text.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0105
data.value: This group uses composed header content and still keeps the same spacing.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0108
data.value: Segmented actions that expose SelectedIndex for MVVM binding.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0117
data.value: Two-way date range selection with custom date format and adaptive picker mode.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0123
data.value: Use PopupType to keep mobile behavior aligned with other pickers.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0125
data.value: One-time passcode input with paste distribution, arrow navigation, and completion command.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0129
data.value: Set IsMasked for payment or security codes.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0131
data.value: Page navigation with edge buttons, compact mode, and MVVM page changes.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0135
data.value: Hide edge buttons and page text for dense toolbars.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0137
data.value: Two-thumb range input for filtering values with MVVM lower and upper bindings.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0143
data.value: Small and large classes keep track and thumb sizes consistent with the rest of the theme.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0145
data.value: Use the default percentage label or place custom content in the center.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0146
data.value: Use one slider to control multiple semi-circle progress bars with the same 0-100 value.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0148
data.value: Use one value to control every determinate Slider and ProgressBar on this page.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0152
data.value: Command, dropdown, spinner, pager, autocomplete, and refresh primitives.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0172
data.value: Use PopupType to keep confirmations mobile-friendly without changing commands.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0174
data.value: The confirmation is rendered in the current shell sheet. Commands and close behavior stay the same.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0177
data.value: Desktop uses normal scrolling; touch surfaces can trigger refresh gestures.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0181
data.value: Single line text that only starts marquee scrolling when the content overflows its viewport.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0183
data.value: Flash sale: grilled eel rice set, truffle fries, jasmine sparkling tea, and seasonal cake are available until 21:30.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0187
data.value: Long metadata can scroll without forcing the surrounding row to stretch beyond its layout.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0205
data.value: Unified surfaces, subtle elevation, semantic borders, and readable glass.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0206
data.value: The base card uses the same neutral surface across the library.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0208
data.value: Elevation now changes shadow and edge strength without turning into a separate gray card.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0211
data.value: Hover keeps the card in the same material family and only adds a light state change.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0214
data.value: State cards use a colored border instead of a full tinted surface.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0222
data.value: Controls inside a glass card keep the same spacing and interaction states as solid cards.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0242
data.value: Grouped list with a right-side index. Clicking a key jumps to the matching section, and scrolling updates the active key.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0260
data.value: By leveraging the 'Key' property, you can display full Chinese section headers while keeping the right-side index bar neat (e.g. A-Z or â˜…).

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0309
data.value: Inject a massive flat list (e.g. from an API). LuminaUI automatically parses your callbacks to generate sections, groups, and the right-side index bar.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0313
data.value: Reusable interaction components for overflow text, alphabetical indexes, and linked category scrolling.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0315
data.value: Ordering-style linked navigation. Left categories jump the right list, and right-side scrolling keeps the selected category in sync.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0319
data.value: Slow cooked beef, soft egg, house sauce.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0321
data.value: Chicken thigh, pickled cucumber, chili mayo.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0331
data.value: Pan fried pork dumplings, vinegar soy.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0334
data.value: Cold brewed tea with citrus soda.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0338
data.value: Native navigation pages, content containers, carousel, transitioning content, and notification surfaces.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0350
data.value: The pane can stay readable on desktop and collapse to the compact strip on narrow layouts.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0358
data.value: DrawerPage is the native sidebar pattern for app-level navigation.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0369
data.value: Track build health, review queue, and component coverage in one compact surface.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0371
data.value: Navigation, overlays, pickers, and action controls now have dedicated examples.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0373
data.value: The carousel scales with the card and keeps controls anchored inside the component.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0384
data.value: Expandable disclosure panels for progressive settings and advanced content.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0396
data.value: Full content tabs with line, browser, pill, vertical, bottom, and mobile bottom navigation variants.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0397
data.value: Default line tabs keep the selected page close to the content.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0398
data.value: Use this variant for ordinary document or settings sections.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0399
data.value: Project content sits in a bordered surface connected to browser-style tabs.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0400
data.value: The selected tab blends into the content surface below.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0401
data.value: Useful for editors, consoles, and dashboard panes.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0406
data.value: Bottom placement moves the indicator above the tab labels.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0414
data.value: Vertical TabControl keeps the tab list and selected content in one native control.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0416
data.value: Mobile layout keeps content above the tab bar.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0421
data.value: Standalone TabStrip variants for line tabs, browser tabs, segmented pills, vertical navigation, and compact tool surfaces.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0424
data.value: Default underline style for simple content sections.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0428
data.value: Browser-style tabs connect visually to the panel underneath.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0433
data.value: Pills work well as segmented mode switches.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0437
data.value: Compact tabs fit dense toolbars and data panels.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0438
data.value: Content area above, tab selector below.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0443
data.value: Vertical tabs suit preference pages and side-by-side editors.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0448
data.value: TabStripItem content can be composed with icons, counters, or status marks.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0450
data.value: Mobile style stacks the icon above the label and lets items divide the available width.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0474
data.value: Slider, playback slider, and ProgressBar states.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0476
data.value: Click anywhere on the track to seek, drag the thumb, and show buffered progress behind the current position.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0478
data.value: Text, surface, label, link, validation, icon, and scrolling primitives.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0481
data.value: Body copy wraps naturally and uses the secondary text color for lower visual noise in dense screens.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0482
data.value: Caption text for helper copy and metadata.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0500
data.value: Use a unique address before saving.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0512
data.value: Consistent, accessible, and vibrant semantic tokens.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0517
data.value: Body Text (14px, Regular). LuminaUI uses high contrast text for readability without pure black or pure white.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0518
data.value: Muted Text (12px). Used for captions, placeholders, and secondary information.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0520
data.value: A single surface family with subtle borders, shadows, and glass.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0522
data.value: Flat neutral surface with a one-pixel outline.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0524
data.value: The same family, with stronger depth instead of a separate gray fill.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0526
data.value: Blurred translucent material with a readable tint over flat backgrounds.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0528
data.value: LuminaUI relies on a strictly defined set of semantic color tokens, mirroring the granularity of enterprise systems. By mapping UI elements to these logical tokens instead of hardcoded hex values, your application achieves flawless 0-cost Dark/Light mode switching.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0576
data.value: Menu, ContextMenu, Flyout, and ToolTip examples.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0585
data.value: Flyout content can contain any native controls.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0590
data.value: Tooltip content uses Lumina popup styling.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0593
data.value: Dialog and toast examples for LuminaShell, including AXAML component content.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0596
data.value: This dialog is declared directly inside OverlaysShowcasePage.axaml. C# only assigns it to the shell.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0604
data.value: Dialog content can be a reusable AXAML component, or a dialog declared in this page.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0608
data.value: Toast is hosted by the same shell overlay layer and supports compact status feedback.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0610
data.value: Bottom sheets provide mobile-friendly action menus with physical swipe-to-dismiss.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0613
data.value: The dialog body below is a UserControl from DeleteProjectDialogContent.axaml.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0624
data.value: This component is a normal UserControl declared in AXAML. The dialog host only receives it as content.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0633
data.value: You are on the Detail Page!

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0634
data.value: Use the button to return to the previous sandbox page.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0640
data.value: This page was pushed onto the NavigationPage stack.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0652
data.value: Standalone indicators, loading overlays, and disabled containers.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0660
data.value: Members, roles, and audit state remain visible under the loading mask.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0663
data.value: This section is disabled by the container.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0668
data.value: Vertical event streams with status markers, time text, and alternate placement.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0684
data.value: Courier is heading to the destination.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0687
data.value: Optional color picking module with ColorPicker and ColorView themes.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0689
data.value: Two-way color binding updates this preview immediately.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0699
data.value: Optional table module for editable, sortable, and resizable tabular data.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0701
data.value: Text, checkbox, and template columns stay inside the same Lumina table surface.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0707
data.value: Optional hierarchical table module with flat and tree-shaped data sources.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0717
data.value: Navigation paths with icons, separators, and MVVM commands.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0727
data.value: Readable key-value groups for details, summaries, and metadata.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0741
data.value: Inline confirmation popup for destructive or important actions.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0744
data.value: This action removes the selected release draft.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0745
data.value: This action removes the selected release draft and every pending publish task that belongs to it. Please confirm only after checking the package owner.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0749
data.value: The current package will be visible to all consumers.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0753
data.value: The workspace remains recoverable for 30 days.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0756
data.value: Selectable rating input with half values, clear behavior, and read-only display.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0762
data.value: A button that opens a drop-down menu.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0763
data.value: A button with a primary action and a dropdown for secondary actions.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0764
data.value: A container that enables hierarchical navigation.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0765
data.value: A container that provides a header for its content.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0766
data.value: A container with a sliding drawer.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0767
data.value: A container with two views: a pane for navigation and a content area.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0768
data.value: A content control that applies a transition when its content changes.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0769
data.value: A control that presents a collection of items, one at a time.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0770
data.value: A control that presents a collection of items.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0771
data.value: A control that provides suggestions as the user types.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0772
data.value: A page that allows users to switch between different views using tabs.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0774
data.value: Active in release planning and design review.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0778
data.value: AOT-safe helper APIs for layout motion, size changes, opacity changes, and concise C# animations.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0786
data.value: Bind Rotation from the ViewModel for angle changes without code-behind.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0787
data.value: Bind section view models and item templates directly. The index bar is still generated by LuminaIndexedList.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0788
data.value: Bind TranslateX/Y and Scale from the ViewModel for obvious transform animations.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0792
data.value: By leveraging the 'Key' property, you can display full Chinese section headers while keeping the right-side index bar neat (e.g. A-Z or ★).

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0793
data.value: Changes were applied without leaving the page.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0800
data.value: Desktop and mobile both use TopView + Shell; this page hides shell chrome only.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0801
data.value: Desktop can wrap the same root view with LuminaWindow. Mobile can use the root view directly as the first visual.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0802
data.value: Dialog, toast and sheet examples for shell scope and top-view full-page scope.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0809
data.value: Entry, show/hide and disabled feedback are attached properties.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0813
data.value: Filter by assignee, label, or status

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0823
data.value: Input control for tags and close button.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0835
data.value: Mobile opens the picker in a bottom sheet with preview, tabs, and stacked actions.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0844
data.value: Opacity and layout helpers can be combined for small state changes.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0850
data.value: Owns component QA, accessibility checks, and release notes.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0856
data.value: Pointer feedback is available without handlers or page code-behind.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0868
data.value: Reusable backdrop blur surface. Card.Glass uses the same blur renderer underneath.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0881
data.value: Some settings will take effect after restart.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0885
data.value: Spring/back easing and pointer-driven squish are available without page handlers.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0888
data.value: Status content can be hidden without leaving empty gaps.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0889
data.value: Surfaces used to display notifications to the user.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0895
data.value: The helper stays in C# because it targets concrete controls; for MVVM state changes prefer LuminaMotion attached properties.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0896
data.value: The same two-column template can be used without grid lines when embedded inside dense cards.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0897
data.value: The ViewModel changes plain properties; LuminaMotion animates the visual transition.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0914
data.value: token tables for surfaces, text, borders, semantic colors, interaction states, and shadows. Each row compares light and dark values so design decisions are easier to audit.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0916
data.value: BoxShadow tokens are listed separately because they describe depth rather than color.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0918
data.value: Base layers used by the shell, pages, cards, popups, and disabled surfaces.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0920
data.value: Readable text tokens ordered by emphasis.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0922
data.value: Border strength tokens for quiet dividers, default outlines, and hover/focus emphasis.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0924
data.value: Action and feedback colors with base, hover, pressed, foreground, and background variants.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0926
data.value: Supporting colors for charts, tags, illustrations, and optional theme accents.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0928
data.value: State overlays, window glass, and card glass tokens used by composited surfaces.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0935
data.value: Pointer hover, floating surfaces, and stronger popups.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0959
data.value: Text and icon color on primary surfaces.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.0975
data.value: Warm data points and attention accents.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1073
data.value: Uses compiled bindings and avoids reflection-only row generation.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1075
data.value: Long string values are wrapped by the LuminaProperties string template without changing global Label behavior.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1079
data.value: Check your inbox for the code.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1093
data.value: The customer submitted an enterprise onboarding request.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1095
data.value: Legal review is still in progress.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1097
data.value: A workspace will be created after approval.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1122
data.value: Use page-level banners for persistent guidance.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1123
data.value: Use inline warnings before destructive actions.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1135
data.value: Hierarchical selection through cascading dropdown panels.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1139
data.value: Hover expands children; click a parent to select it and close.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1157
data.value: Empty state placeholder for when there is no data to display.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1161
data.value: Try adjusting your search or filter to find what you're looking for.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1164
data.value: Create your first project to get started.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1171
data.value: You can replace the entire layout with custom content.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1237
data.value: Two-column property rows for editor panels, inspectors, and compact settings surfaces.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1249
data.value: Guide users through a multi-step process with progress indication.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1267
data.value: Enter your credentials to sign in.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1307
data.value: TopView, Shell, login, and mobile composition.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1308
data.value: Use one TopView at the visual root, then put Shell inside it. Login and startup pages are routed by Shell and hide shell chrome.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1321
data.value: Use the fluent helper for explicit one-off animations from component code.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1327
data.value: Native OS-level modal windows with customizable buttons, ideal for traditional desktop applications requiring deep user attention.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1329
data.value: Pre-configured button groups (OkCancel, YesNo) triggered via a single line of C# code.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1334
data.value: Embed any XAML content inside the dialog, like inputs, comboboxes or complex forms.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1338
data.value: Override the footer with completely custom templates or hide it completely.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1342
data.value: Do you want to save the changes before closing this document?

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1345
data.value: This action requires connecting to the internet. Continue?

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1347
data.value: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this repository? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1349
data.value: Please select an environment to deploy to:

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1359
data.value: This dialog uses a completely custom footer element provided via the Footer property.

data.name: Sandbox.Text.1362
data.value: This dialog has ShowFooter=False. You can build your own buttons inside the content area.
